description:
Create a systematic grid of waypoints for a Search and Rescue (SAR) operation in Garmin BaseCamp. Create a list named 'SAR Grid - Fells' containing six waypoints with the 'Flag, Blue' symbol at the following coordinates:
- GRID-A1: N 42.44400°, W 71.09600°
- GRID-A2: N 42.44400°, W 71.09400°
- GRID-A3: N 42.44400°, W 71.09200°
- GRID-B1: N 42.44600°, W 71.09600°
- GRID-B2: N 42.44600°, W 71.09400°
- GRID-B3: N 42.44600°, W 71.09200°
Export the list to C:\workspace\output\sar_grid.gpx, ensuring no other waypoints are included in the file.
